overview: CropGuard AI is a comprehensive crop disease detection and farm management platform for farmers. It combines AI-powered disease identification from photos, a community forum, seasonal guidance, and expert resources to help farmers protect their crops and maximize yields.
features: AI disease detection from photos and live camera
Crop health history with timeline tracking
Disease severity map showing regional disease patterns
Offline scan mode for rural areas
Seasonal crop calendar with planting schedules
Fertilizer and soil health guide by crop type
Market price tracker with live links
Yield estimator by crop area and health
Photo tips guide for better detection accuracy
Success stories feed with before/after recovery posts
AI chatbot with built-in agricultural knowledge
Emergency appointment booking for agricultural officers
